title: digitaria diagonalis var. uniglumis
intro: Digitaria diagonalis var. uniglumis, also known as Digitaria, is a type of grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Digitaria are said to include lowering blood sugar levels, reducing cholesterol levels, and improving cardiovascular health. Digitaria is commonly prepared as a tea or capsule, and in some cases, it is also used as a component in herbal preparations for the treatment of various health conditions.
